title: UIBundle (Beta) - Metadata API
description: Represents a Salesforce Multi-Framework app, such as a React app.
file_information: UIBundle components have the suffix .uibundle-meta.xml and are stored in the uiBundles/your_app folder.

description.description: A description of what the web application does.

isActive.description: Specifies whether the web application is accessible (true) or not (false).

masterLabel.description: Specifies the web-application name that appears in the UI.

target.description: Specifies the Salesforce target where the app is supported. Valid values are: AppLauncher: Makes the app available in the App Launcher. This is the default target if you don’t specify a value. Experience: Indicates that the app is an external-facing site or portal and makes it available in the Digital Experiences app.

version.description: Indicates the version of the web application.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="UIBundle">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="isActive" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="isProtected" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="target" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="version" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a UIBundle component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<UIBundle xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata">
    <masterLabel>Customer Portal</masterLabel>
    <description>Customer self-service portal built with React.</description>
    <isActive>true</active>
    <target>AppLauncher</target>
    <version>1</version>
</UIBundle>
